panel.title: VetSaaS assistant
panel.subtitle: Product help · read-only clinic lookups
panel.welcome: I can explain how to use VetSaaS or look up clinic data: patients, today’s cash register, stock, expiries, who’s on duty, and alerts.
panel.welcome_platform: I can help with SaaS operations: billing, renewals, Bot AI, OpenWA, cold leads, and panel navigation.
panel.empty_hint: Pick a shortcut or type your own question.
panel.not_configured: OPENAI_API_KEY was not found on the server. If you already added it to .env, restart PHP (Herd/php-fpm) or run php artisan config:clear and reload.
panel.error: I couldn’t reply right now. Please try again in a few seconds.

suggestions.help_caja: How do I open a cash session?
suggestions.platform_risk: Which clinics are in grace or suspended?
suggestions.platform_openwa: How are OpenWA and the queue?

panel.limit_reached: You’ve reached today’s assistant limit. Try again tomorrow.

header.title: Appointment schedule
header.description: This is the clinic appointment overview. Reception usually organizes bookings while the veterinary team reviews upcoming visits.

filters.title: Search and narrow the schedule
filters.description: Search by patient, owner, or veterinarian, switch between calendar and list, and adjust the period you need.

create.title: Schedule an appointment
create.description: With create permission, you can select the patient, branch, veterinarian, date, and reason. Read-only roles do not see this step.

view.title: Use calendar or list view
view.description: The calendar helps plan and reschedule; the list helps sort and review details. Available actions depend on your role.

actions.title: Manage each booking
actions.description: For authorized appointments you can edit, cancel, or start the visit. Starting it connects the appointment to the patient's clinical history.

header.title: Patient directory
header.description: Review registered pets and their owners. Reception maintains administrative data while the clinical team accesses patient records.

create.title: Register a patient
create.description: If your role can create patients, add the pet's details and identify the owner. Check for duplicates first.

filters.title: Find a pet quickly
filters.description: Search by name, owner, or microchip and filter active or inactive patients.

list.title: Review the directory
list.description: The list shows identification, species, owner, and status. Select a name to open the record when your role has access.

actions.title: Patient actions
actions.description: Depending on your permissions, you can edit details, open history, download the vaccination card, or deactivate records.

header.title: Clinical histories
header.description: This view brings together patient consultations. Clinical staff records care while other roles only see authorized operations.

create.title: Start a consultation
create.description: With clinical permission, you can choose the patient and document the reason, exam, diagnosis, and progress.

filters.title: Filter consultations
filters.description: Search by patient or owner and combine status and date range to find open, closed, or older consultations.

list.title: Review the record
list.description: Each row summarizes date, status, patient, reason, weight, and veterinarian. Older open consultations are highlighted.

actions.title: Continue the clinical workflow
actions.description: Depending on your role, you can edit the consultation or manage treatment plans, vaccinations, or charges. Medical content remains restricted.

announcement.title: New AI assistant in VetSaaS
announcement.body: You now get product help and clinic lookups without leaving the app. Open it at the top right: it’s a floating window you can move and resize.

features.help: Guides you to each module and how to use it
features.lookup: Looks up patients, stock, alerts and more (read-only)
features.agenda: Checks today’s or tomorrow’s appointments by vet or branch
features.nav: Floating window: drag and resize it without blocking the screen
